description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a two-tone color scheme with a matte black upper and a pale yellow sole, toe cap, and heel counter. The shoe has a streamlined silhouette with a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and visible stitching along the upper panels. The side panels display subtle overlays and textural details, while the lacing system uses standard eyelets and black laces. The sole is thick and slightly textured, designed for urban walking or casual sports activities. The overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic leather and rubber, providing durability and flexibility for everyday use.
description: A two-tone athletic sneaker with a matte black upper and pale yellow sole, featuring standard laces and a padded collar. The design is sporty and modern, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded heel counter and the layered construction of the sole, with the yellow heel and black upper clearly separated.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black upper with subtle overlays, the yellow sole, and the standard lacing system.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe cap in yellow, black laces, and the symmetrical design of the upper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the black upper, yellow sole, and the overall streamlined profile.
